Adding dakuten (゛) to H-row gives B-row

learn.hint: Yōon: a small や/ゆ/よ is added after an i-row kana to form a new sound
The small よ/ゆ/や blends with the i-row kana
Small ゅ merges with し to make 'shu'
Small ょ merges with ち to make 'cho'

practice.question: What makes a Yōon sound?
options: A small ya/yu/yo combined with an i-row kana
Two large kana side by side
practice.answer: A small ya/yu/yo combined with an i-row kana
